text.title: Solo Content Calendar Template Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every Solo Content Calendar Template application must enforce. These are HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: Each row MUST cite a pain_ref from the ICP pain ladder; rows pinned to a pain no longer in top-5 are auto-flagged for retirement.
rule.rationale: Content unpinned from ranked ICP pain drifts to entertainment; entertainment never converts for solo founders.

rule.statement: Cadence MUST be exactly one shippable asset per week_iso; two-in-one-week and zero-the-next is a violation.
rule.rationale: Search and audience algorithms reward regularity, not bursts.

rule.statement: Next week's row MUST be at status='drafted' by Friday EOD; failure replaces next week's writing block with backfill.
rule.rationale: Blank-page anxiety on Monday kills the week; carrying a draft keeps cadence under stress.

rule.statement: Each row MUST declare ONE channel AND ONE primary keyword OR hook; multi-channel multi-keyword rows are rejected.
rule.rationale: Spreading one asset across channels thins launch energy.

rule.statement: Quarterly review MUST retire assets whose pain_ref left top-5 OR whose publish-to-conversion ratio is below median for ≥8 weeks; retirement = stop promoting (do not delete).
rule.rationale: Old underperformers eat crawl budget and audience trust; quarterly pruning lifts the rest.
